detail: all RISCs waiting (W); CB counts audited balanced; triage callstack dump failed (ElfFile import error). Suspect boot init or matmul helper deadlock.

description: Debug SDPA QK matmul unpack hang

detail: held (no-pop) operands in 1D B_q chains (phases 3b m_prev, 4 m_run, 5 alpha) changed Scalar->Block + HeldBulk. Scalar on a non-popped operand reads tile 0 every iter (wrong for B_q>1). non_square (n_kv=2,B_q=4) now PASS.
